name: avatar
title: Avatar
description: A rounded image with a graceful fallback.

files.content:
<script lang="ts">
	import { Avatar as AvatarPrimitive } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		children,
		...restProps
	}: AvatarPrimitive.FallbackProps = $props();
</script>

<AvatarPrimitive.Fallback
	bind:ref
	class={cn(
		'flex size-full items-center justify-center bg-muted text-sm font-semibold text-muted-foreground',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
>
	{@render children?.()}
</AvatarPrimitive.Fallback>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Avatar as AvatarPrimitive } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: AvatarPrimitive.ImageProps = $props();
</script>

<AvatarPrimitive.Image
	bind:ref
	class={cn('aspect-square size-full object-cover', className)}
	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Avatar as AvatarPrimitive } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		loadingStatus = $bindable('loading'),
		children,
		...restProps
	}: AvatarPrimitive.RootProps = $props();
</script>

<AvatarPrimitive.Root
	bind:ref
	bind:loadingStatus
	class={cn(
		'relative flex size-10 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full border border-border shadow-xs',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
>
	{@render children?.()}
</AvatarPrimitive.Root>
